target_object_rows.why_selected: Holding-veto and add timing both matter; core leader is the cleanest main-uptrend confirmation object.
Needs cleaner de-risk versus continuation separation during strong-board extension days.
Admission/add windows exist, but daily confirmation is now exhausted and needs intraday quality checks.
Eligibility-only line; intraday should remain secondary here and used only after the three stronger action names.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: After breaking intraday VWAP / session anchor, measure whether price reclaims the level quickly with improving turnover.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: Constructive shakeouts in a real diffusion main-uptrend often reclaim structure; distribution days stay below and degrade.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: Distinguish upward expansion with price follow-through from high turnover with stalled price progress.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: The project now needs to know whether stronger board days still represent profitable extension or already-fragile churn.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: Evaluate whether the symbol closes back near the intraday strength zone or fades into the close.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: A real main-uptrend diffusion leg usually preserves close quality; fading closes are often where daily-only add logic overcommits.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: Measure whether the symbol strengthens intraday relative to the board's other core names and to the communication / optical ETF proxy.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: The target is not generic momentum; it is expansion inside an already-diffusing main-uptrend board.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: Track whether incremental turnover is concentrating back into core names or dispersing toward fragile tails.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: Core concentration strengthening supports add; noisy tail dispersion warns that the day may be broad but low quality.

intraday_factor_rows.factor_definition: Detect repeated intraday push attempts that make less price progress while using more turnover.
intraday_factor_rows.why_it_matters_for_diffusion_main_markup: This is the practical intraday proxy for 'future upside probability stops improving'.

action_mapping_rows.expectancy_semantics: Worth participating, but not yet a proven acceleration confirmation.
action_mapping_rows.reading: Daily board-state and role-state still do most of the work here.

action_mapping_rows.expectancy_semantics: Future winning probability is being revised up while downside probability is being revised down.
action_mapping_rows.reading: This is the main reason to add intraday now.

action_mapping_rows.expectancy_semantics: Future upside probability is weakening or payoff quality is decaying, but the line is not fully invalid yet.
action_mapping_rows.reading: Daily information got us close, but this is where same-day quality matters.
Hard veto remains daily-first, with intraday used for timing confirmation rather than rewriting the veto.

readiness_audit.blocking_reason: No minute/intraday raw files are present under data/raw yet.
readiness_audit.teaching_boundary: Intraday is not for generic alpha mining; it is only for confirming add/reduce quality inside diffusion-style main-uptrend board states.

interpretation: V1.14Q narrows the intraday question to the real unresolved layer: confirmation for add/reduce inside a diffusion-style main-uptrend board.
This protocol deliberately avoids generic intraday alpha mining. It only supports action-quality confirmation where the daily layer has already been exhausted.
The current repository does not yet contain raw intraday bars, so the next step is data collection for a very small symbol set, not immediate intraday replay.
